reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the app. Many would be free just to still have to pay or not work at all. Not this one. I loved the combination of badminton and saber. It’s engaging, working out your body. Give it a try!
It sucks 👎👎👎👎👎👎 so it ur thinking of downloading it don't 😡👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎

At least the game tells you it is bad, right in the title. Sure, it is meant to be a play on badminton, but the only thing this has related to badminton are the shuttlecocks that are randomly thrown at you and a racket in your hand. Then the attempt at ‘Beat Saber’, literally using background animation from a ‘Beat Saber’ map is as close as it gets. This game is so generic it looks like the game was generated by AI as much as all the game images shown on the store front are. Sure, the idea could be expanded on and there could be a worthy game concept from it, but this is not doing it. At least it was free, the only thing I lost was the time trying to see if there was even anything worth playing for.
